title: IPO-anchored VWAP
question: Does buying the IPO-anchored VWAP touch actually work, and does it depend on company size?
finding: No edge, and netted against the cohort it's slightly worse than random. Across 881 IPOs / 188 liquid names the touch wins ~49% (90d CI [43.0, 54.2]); the big positive averages are cohort drift (random entry made +144% at 1y vs the touch's +25%), and on a clustered test the touch underperforms random by 22pts at 90d (significant at 1y, p=0.026). It holds out-of-sample and survives no size bucket or refinement; the cohort is all small caps (none above $100B).
